---
title: "Week 13 --- Dummy Variables"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 13 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Qualitative Predictors | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Interaction Terms | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Structural Breaks in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
